summary: Executed backend + frontend regression for the redesigned landing page and inquiry flow on the public preview URL. All requested core flows passed, including SMTP-missing fallback behavior (save succeeds, user gets friendly fallback success message).
action_items: Optional cleanup: remove or rewrite legacy test files still using outdated inquiry payload fields (business_numbers/accept_guarantee_terms contract drift from current implementation).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend SMTP fallback is correctly resilient: request persists even when SMTP env is missing, and warning is logged server-side.
Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL correctly and displays user-friendly fallback success text when email delivery is pending.
No MongoDB _id leakage detected in tested API responses.
test_credentials: No auth flow required for this scope. /app/memory/test_credentials.md exists but contains no credentials.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* inquiry/status data through API during automated tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated sticky nav links, hero/pricing/content sections, required form fields + 4 mandatory checkboxes, inquiry submission persistence, SMTP fallback UX message, backend warning logs, FAQ/footer presence, and responsive no-overflow on desktop/mobile.
rca of the issue: No blocking bug found in requested scope. Initial Playwright run had viewport click flakiness (elements outside viewport) caused by test script flow, not app logic; resolved by scrolling to top and using scroll_into_view_if_needed before nav clicks.
